scripts.test:docker: docker run --rm -it --network host -v $(pwd):/app/ -w /app/ mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.61.1-noble sh -c 'corepack enable && pnpm playwright test "$@"' --
scripts.test:docker:all: docker run --rm --network host -v $(pwd):/app -w /app mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.61.1-noble sh -c 'corepack enable && pnpm test:all'
